content.full_text:
California
Fair Political
Practices Commission


June 15, 1993


Tom Heaton
725 Edgewood Road
San Mateo, CA 94402

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. G-93-246


Dear Mr. Heaton:

This is in reply to Senator Quentin Kopp's request that we
assist in addressing your question as to whether there are any
laws prohibiting a former director of a state agency from
endorsing products utilized by that agency.

We have researched this issue and find no law or agency
regulation that prohibits former state agency employees (including
directors and management level employees) from engaging in this
activity after they have left office.

If there are additional facts which you think may alter our
conclusion, please contact us at the above address and we will
assist you as best we can.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
Assistant General Counsel

cc: Senator Quentin L. Kopp




428 J Street, Suite 800 • P.O. Box 807 • Sacramento, CA 95804-0807 • (916) 322-5660
